sections.heading: storageGetConfig
sections.body:
The `storageGetConfig` command returns the current federated database instance
configuration.

```javascript
db.runCommand( { "storageGetConfig" : 1 } )
```

To learn more about this command, see [Retrieve Configuration File](adf-getstorageconfig).

sections.heading: storageSetConfig
sections.body:
The `storageSetConfig` command replaces the current federated database instance
configuration with a JSON (Javascript Object Notation) document.

```javascript
db.runCommand( { "storageSetConfig" : <config> } )
```

To learn more about this command, see [setStorageConfig](adf-setstorageconfig).

sections.heading: storageValidateConfig
sections.body:
The `storageValidateConfig` command validates the given federated database instance
configuration.

```javascript
db.runCommand( { "storageValidateConfig" : <config> } )
```

To learn more about this command, see
[Validate Configuration File](adf-validatestorageconfig).
